lessons.title: Radiographic Sensitivity and Contrast
objectives: Define radiographic sensitivity and the factors that govern it
Differentiate radiographic contrast, film contrast, and subject contrast

lessons.title: Definition, Graininess, and Image Quality Indicators
objectives: Explain image definition and the effects of film graininess and screen mottle
Describe IQI types and how IQIs verify radiographic quality
cp105Topics: Technique 4.6 Film graininess and screen mottle effects
